content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the additive e2e fixture (src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs, ~1081 lines) plus the MockBr/MockBv dispatch extensions. The fixture creates a Ready milestone with a valid bundle, a 3-bead DAG with mixed parent_child/blocks dependencies, and pre-configured mock responses for list/show/create/close/sync (br) and robot-next (bv). The smoke test passes, runs in ~0.00s, cargo fmt check passes, and the full lib test suite (1066 tests) remains green. The scenario bundle passes MilestoneBundle validation (acceptance coverage mirrors bead.acceptance_criteria; no cycles; references resolve). Mock dispatch state is shared via Arc<Mutex<_>> so clones share follow-up state as expected. Pre-existing clippy errors on master are unrelated to this bead. No real bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps were found.

## Amendments

None.
